Plaintiff'S Renoticed Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing Against Defendant Christopher Michael Davis
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Alexis Davidson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BRENDA TILLMAN.
Clerk Newton Knowles Law Clerk for the Michael Law Firm is also present in court.
Plaintiff Brenda Tillman is not present was previously sworn and examined on her own behalf on June 5, 2014. Plaintiff's appearance was excused by the court for today.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Christopher Michael Davis,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendants Does 1- 10 were dismissed without prejudice at the hearing on June 5, 2014.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court ordered matter under submission.

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing Against Deft Christopher Michael Davis
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Issa J. Michael, Esq., and Alexis Davidson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Brenda Tillman.
Plaintiff Brenda Tillman is present.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Christopher Michael Davis,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendants Does dismissed.
Witness: Brenda Tillman Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court orders the matter continued to June 30, 2014, Monday at 11:00 am for further Hearing. Plaintiff's Counsel can submit additional arguments and authorities for the Court to consider prior to the hearing. Courtesy copies to be delivered to Department 514.
